expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: No mention of ecosystem.env. Suggested ~/.zshrc or a generic .env file.

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Used NOTION_API_KEY which does not match the ecosystem convention.

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: Suggested putting the export directly in ~/.zshrc, not sourcing a separate file.

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommended editing ~/.zshrc to add the token.

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: No mention of any example or template file.
